title: Recover Rust IPv6 and Meshtastic bounds
description: Recover UDP/ICMPv6 boundary validation, DAD behavior, coalesced Meshtastic GATT message preservation, and explicit RouteRequest handling.
acceptance_criteria: Oversized UDP and malformed NS drop; packet-level DAD vectors pass; coalesced GATT bytes are preserved; route variants are deterministic; tests/clippy and three reviews pass.
